title: Cashback
claimIntro: This page ask you to claim rewards into your account. This transaction will impact your balance.
minimumClaimMsg: Your cashback is on the way. Every purchase you make through Nightly earns you real crypto cashback. Once your earnings cross 0.1 SOL, you'll be able to send them straight to your wallet, fast, on-chain, and yours.
minimumOnWayTitle: Your cashback is on the way.
minimumOnWayMsg1: Every purchase you make through Nightly earns you real crypto cashback.
minimumOnWayMsg2: Once your earnings cross 0.1 SOL, you'll be able to send them straight to your wallet, fast, on-chain, and yours to keep.
minimumKeepShopping: Keep shopping. Your rewards are stacking up.
claimProcessingMsg: Your reward will be ready soon.
rewardClaimedMsg: Your reward has been successfully claimed to {{address}}.
claimFailedMsg: Something went wrong while claiming your reward. Make sure you have stable internet connection and try again.
searchNoMatches: No matches found for your search.
agreeTerms: By clicking Go to shop, you agree to the terms
faqIntro: If you have any question, please read the FAQ below:
